item.title: About
item.description: I’m a master’s student in psychology at Uppsala University. I’m currently interested in cognitive and neurocognitive aspects of reasoning, judgment- and decision-making, working memory, and intelligence.

item.title: PsychRandom.py: A program for randomizing participants to treatment groups
item.description: In order to brush up on my Python skills, I decided to write a small utility program that randomizes participants to treatment groups for psychology experiments.
